exports.name: collectExternalDecoratorModules
exports.description: Collects decorator modules from external macro packages referenced in the code. This function parses macro import comments in the code to find external packages, then loads their manifests and collects all decorator module names. ```

params.name: code
params.description: The TypeScript source code to scan

params.name: requireFn
params.description: Optional custom require function for loading external packages

exports.returns: Array of decorator module names from external packages

exports.name: hasMacroAnnotations
exports.description: Checks whether source code contains `@derive(` as a real JSDoc directive. Only matches `@derive(` when it appears at the start of a JSDoc comment line (after stripping comment syntax like `/**`, `*​/`, `*`, and whitespace). This correctly rejects `@derive` embedded in prose text such as `"Deserialize result format from @derive(Deserialize)"`. Use this instead of `code.includes("@derive")` to avoid false positives. ```

params.name: source
params.description: The TypeScript source code to scan

exports.returns: `true` if the source contains a real `@derive(` directive
examples:
```typescript
hasMacroAnnotations('/** @derive(Debug) *​/ class X {}');     // true
hasMacroAnnotations('/** result from @derive(Debug) *​/');    // false — embedded in prose
hasMacroAnnotations('class X {}');                            // false
```

exports.name: parseMacroImportComments
exports.description: Parses macro import comments from TypeScript code. ```

params.name: text
params.description: The TypeScript source code to parse

exports.returns: Map of macro names to their module paths
exports.remarks: Extracts macro names mapped to their source module paths from macro import comments like: `import macro { ... } from "package"`.

exports.name: RequireFunction
exports.description: Function type for requiring modules. Accepts any function that can load a module by path.

exports.name: clearExternalManifestCache
exports.description: Clears the external manifest cache. Useful for testing or when packages may have been updated.

exports.name: getExternalManifest
exports.description: Attempts to load the manifest from an external macro package. External macro packages (like `@playground/macro`) export their own `__macroforgeGetManifest()` function that provides macro metadata including descriptions. ```

params.name: requireFn
params.description: Optional custom require function. If not provided, creates one using import.meta.url context.

exports.returns: The macro manifest, or null if loading failed

exports.name: getExternalMacroInfo
exports.type: (macroName: tring,, modulePath: tring,, requireFn?: equireFunction) => acroManifestEntry | null
exports.description: Looks up macro info from an external package manifest. ```

params.name: macroName
params.description: The macro name to look up

exports.returns: The macro manifest entry, or null if not found

exports.name: getExternalDecoratorInfo
exports.type: (decoratorName: tring,, modulePath: tring,, requireFn?: equireFunction) => ecoratorManifestEntry | null
exports.description: Looks up decorator info from an external package manifest. ```

params.name: decoratorName
params.description: The decorator name to look up

exports.returns: The decorator manifest entry, or null if not found

exports.name: CONFIG_FILES
exports.description: Supported config file names in order of precedence.

exports.name: ReturnTypesMode
exports.description: Return type style for generated macro code. - `'vanilla'` (default): Plain TypeScript discriminated unions - Deserialize: `{ success: true; value: T } | { success: false; errors: FieldError[] }` - PartialOrd: `number | null` - `'custom'`: Uses `@rydshift/mirror` types - Deserialize: `Result<T, Array<FieldError>>` - PartialOrd: `Option<number>` - `'effect'`: Uses Effect library types - Deserialize: `Exit<FieldError[], T>` - PartialOrd: `Option.Option<number>`

exports.name: ConfigLoadResult
exports.description: Result from parsing a config file.

exports.name: VitePluginConfig
exports.remarks: These options control the Vite plugin behavior for type generation and metadata emission.

exports.name: MacroConfig
exports.remarks: This configuration affects how macros are expanded and what artifacts are preserved in the output.

exports.name: ConfigLoader
exports.description: Function type for loading config content. This allows plugins to inject their own config loading mechanism.

exports.name: findConfigFile
exports.description: Finds a macroforge config file in the directory tree. ```

params.name: startDir
params.description: The directory to start searching from

exports.returns: The path to the config file, or null if not found
exports.remarks: The search stops when: - A config file is found - A package.json boundary is reached - The filesystem root is reached

exports.name: loadMacroConfig

params.name: startDir
params.description: The directory to start searching from (typically the project root)

params.name: loadConfigFn
params.description: Optional function to parse the config file content. If provided, will be called with (content, filepath). If not provided, only the configPath will be set.

exports.returns: The loaded configuration, or default values if no config file is found
exports.remarks: Starting from the given directory, this function walks up the filesystem hierarchy looking for a macroforge config file. The first one found is parsed using the provided loader function (if any), which extracts configuration including foreign type handlers.
